Hero.description: CodeVibes is a software development company specializing in creating exceptional digital experiences for businesses and brands.

Projects.description: From mobile apps to web platforms — see what we've been building.
Projects.manuvance_talent_description: A talent management platform for the talent agency Manuvance.
Projects.github_release_stast_description: Github Release Stats is a tool to check the stats of Github repositories. You can check the download history of releases and the star history of repositories.
Projects.bahix_description: An integrated inventory and billing management solution designed to streamline operations and optimize cash flow for growing businesses.
Projects.sitadairy_description: A dairy management system for the company Sita. It includes features for managing cows, milk production, and more.
Projects.library_description: A collection of many useful websites and tools. They are sorted by category and include some tags to quickly find the right one for your needs.
Projects.roamripples_description: Website for Roam Ripples, a travel agency.
Projects.together_description: A tool for managing households and communities. Features are a shared shopping list, todos, calendar and more.

Team.title: Our Team
Team.description: CodeVibes is a small but dedicated team of developers passionate about creating innovative and high-quality digital experiences.
Team.daniel_description: Daniel is a developer passionate about crafting innovative and user-friendly software solutions.
Team.emanuel_description: Emanuel brings expertise in development and problem-solving, ensuring high-quality and efficient applications at CodeVibes.
Team.locationsDescription: Our locations are Lustenau and Vienna. While we study in Vienna, we work on our projects from both places, staying connected to Vorarlberg as well as the capital.

Contact.title: Get in touch
Contact.description: Have a project in mind? Send us a message and let's create something amazing together.

Services.title: Our Services
Services.description: We offer a comprehensive range of software development services to help your business succeed.
Services.mobile_development_description: We build native and cross-platform mobile applications for iOS and Android that deliver exceptional user experiences.
Services.web_development_description: From simple websites to complex web applications, we create responsive and performant web solutions.
Services.seo_description: We optimize your website for search engines to improve visibility, increase traffic, and help your audience find you organically.
Services.ui_ux_design_description: We create intuitive and visually appealing user interfaces that enhance user experience and engagement.
Services.maintainance_support_description: We provide ongoing maintenance and support services to ensure your software continues to perform optimally.

Imprint.title: Imprint
Imprint.disclaimer_content: The information contained on this website is for general information purposes only. CodeVibes GesbR does not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or usefulness of any information on this site.
Imprint.liability_content: This website may contain links to external websites. CodeVibes GesbR has no control over the content of external websites and is not responsible for them.

Blog.title: Our Blog
Blog.description: At CodeVibes, we love building thoughtful software and sharing what we learn along the way. Here you'll find deep dives into web and app development and behind-the-scenes looks at our projects.

Meta.title: CodeVibes – Web & App Development Company in India
Meta.description: CodeVibes is your partner for modern web & app development. We create custom software solutions with a focus on design, performance, and usability.
Meta.descriptionBlog: Read our latest articles about web development, app development, and software engineering.
